title: Two-Tailed Rat
move_pattern: Starts with random selection among all four moves, then randomly cycles. Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech each have equal weight. Call for Backup has lower weight (0.75) and only occurs if summoning conditions are met.
notes: This monster can summon additional copies of itself via Call for Backup. Summoning is restricted: can only summon every 2 turns (reset by Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech), maximum 3 rats allowed at once, and no other summoned rat can have Call for Backup queued as their next move. All summoned rats share a unified call count to enforce the max limit.
